temporal_deltas.earliest_to_current: The sequence shows a static, empty environment. No growth, decay, or movement of biological material occurred. The only change is the removal of a spoon and the shifting of light/shadows.

visual_health_inference.conclusion: Total biological failure. The pots are currently serving as empty containers for substrate only.
visual_health_inference.evidence: Zero chlorophyll-bearing tissue detected in any frame.

anomalies.interventions: Presence of a white rabbit figurine in P3. Presence of a spoon in early images. No biological interventions detected.

vision_report.narrative_description: I have performed a meticulous audit of the provided image sequence. My first step was to establish the spatial orientation of the pots and identify the presence of the scale anchor (white rabbit). Upon validation, I cross-referenced the visual data with the biome registry. The audit confirms that all registered specimens (P1-P4) are absent. The pots contain only soil and substrate. There is no evidence of plant life, past or present, within the frame. The environment is sterile of vegetation.
